concept: Reflect / To Consider the Inner Whole
description: The act of deep, quiet, and careful consideration of one's own inner state, thoughts, or experiences. It is a turning of the mind inward to understand the self.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'the' (deliberate consideration), 'mi' (the inner self), and 'o' (wholeness). The word's structure suggests 'a deliberate consideration of the inner whole.' This frames reflection as a profound, holistic examination of the self.
